title: The Mysteries Of Elusis
company: The Theatre of the Mysteries and the Actors presents
description: Can you keep a secret? The Theatre of the Mysteries presents: The Mysteries of Eleusis! Travel to ancient Greece and become an initiate of a 3000 year old secret! Expect immersive myths brought to life through metaphor, music and dance. Meet the gods, walk in their footsteps and revel with them as you are guided through the esoteric to find just how deep the mysteries go! Audience participation is required so you really ought to dress for the occasion. The dress code is ancient Greek myths although it is not mandatory. LGBTQIA+ friendly with music by the Olympic gods of jazz; local legends, Hill Collective. The event will be in 4 parts with regular intervals in-between. The last hour will be a celebration party. We hope you will stay with us for the full journey, but you are welcome to depart, as you wish!
